identity.name: Seymour Law
identity.mission: To provide world-class commercial legal services with the warmth and personalized attention of a boutique Bahamian firm.
identity.vibe: Modern Colonial Editorial. Trustworthy, sophisticated, warm, authoritative, non-templated.

scale.label: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500 font-semibold

layout_strategies.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode A (The Tetris Grid) for Marketing sections.
layout_strategies.spacing: Generous. Use py-24 or py-32 for section vertical padding. Gap-8 to Gap-16.
layout_strategies.alignment: Asymmetrical. Avoid centering text unless it's a quote. Use left align with ample negative space on the right.

buttons.style: Sharp edges or very slight rounding (rounded-sm).
buttons.primary: bg-[#0F172A] text-white hover:bg-[#1E293B] px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border border-[#0F172A] text-[#0F172A] hover:bg-[#0F172A] hover:text-white px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase transition-all duration-300
buttons.link: text-[#0F172A] underline decoration-[#C6A668] underline-offset-4 hover:decoration-2 transition-all

cards.style: Flat, no shadow. 1px border in 'stone-200' or transparent with 'hover:bg-white' transition.
cards.content: Minimal. Title, thin line separator, short description.

navigation.style: Sticky. Glassmorphism with a 'frosted limestone' feel (backdrop-blur-md bg-[#F9F8F6]/80). Border-b border-stone-200/50.

hero.description: Abstract calm ocean view from a dock. Use as a subtle background or split-screen element. It represents 'Bahamian Calm' and 'Stability'.

legacy.description: White colonial building with tower. Represents 'Established History' and 'Government Relations'.

texture.description: Limestone texture. Use as a subtle overlay or section background with low opacity to add tactile feel.

practice_areas.description: Fountain pen on notebook. Elegant, classic legal imagery without being cheesy.

motion.instructions: Use 'framer-motion' for all entrances. Use 'ScrollTrigger' or viewport based animation for sections.

styles.fade_up: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 40 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, ease: 'easeOut' }} viewport={{ once: true }}
styles.parallax: Use subtle y-axis movement on images relative to scroll speed.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure gold text is only used on dark navy backgrounds. On light backgrounds, use gold for borders/icons only, not text.
accessibility.semantic_html: Use <article> for practice areas, <aside> for contact info, <nav> for menu.
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Manrope' for body.
Do NOT use gradients. Use solid colors or texture overlays.
Do NOT center text by default. Left align creates better readability and tension.
Use 2-3x more whitespace than you think is necessary.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Override default shadcn CSS variables in index.css to match the Palette above.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'framer-motion' and 'lucide-react'. 2. Update index.css with the new color variables. 3. Build a 'Navbar' that is sticky and glassmorphic. 4. Build a 'Hero' that uses the ocean image as a subtle side or background element, focusing on the tagline. 5. Build 'PracticeAreas' as an elegant accordion or list. 6. Build a 'Footer' that is deep navy with gold accents. 7. Use the provided image URLs strictly.
